form.formComment: On debut at this trip. Last start finished second at this track over 375m in (22.01). Can adapt and make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (22.23) over 375m at this track. Aided by a low draw and can measure up.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 525m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (31.37) behind Flying Nash in a Grade 5 on March 27. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.10) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Murray Bridge Straight over 300m in 17.08. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 342m at Angle Park at Grade 6 level. Hard to envisage a win.
